# Kenney Game Assets

This directory contains a curated subset of free game assets from Kenney.

Source packages:

- New Platformer Pack: https://kenney.nl/assets/new-platformer-pack
- Space Shooter Extension: https://kenney.nl/assets/space-shooter-extension
- Particle Pack: https://kenney.nl/assets/particle-pack
- Puzzle Pack 2: https://kenney.nl/assets/puzzle-pack-2
- Game Icons: https://kenney.nl/assets/game-icons
- UI Pack: https://kenney.nl/assets/ui-pack
- Interface Sounds: https://kenney.nl/assets/interface-sounds
- Impact Sounds: https://kenney.nl/assets/impact-sounds

License:

- Creative Commons Zero, CC0: https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/
- Kenney credit is appreciated by the original author but not required by the license.

Project usage:

- Only selected PNG and OGG assets are checked in. The original zip files are not bundled.
- Each package subdirectory keeps the original `LICENSE.txt` from that package.
- Runtime code must keep a canvas/procedural fallback so games remain playable if an image fails to load.
- UI sound playback must stay tied to user-triggered interaction and remain low volume.
